LightningComponentBundle.description: FAQ Accordion component that displays frequently asked questions in an expandable/collapsible accordion format. Features 3 default sections with the first section expanded by default, exclusive accordion behavior, full keyboard navigation, ARIA compliance, and complete SLDS 2 styling with semantic color system. Optimized for performance and accessibility.

property.name: sections
property.label: FAQ Sections (JSON)
property.description: JSON array of FAQ objects with question and answer properties. Format: [{"id":"unique-id","question":"Your question?","answer":"Your answer","isExpanded":false}]. Leave empty to use default FAQ content.

property.name: allowMultipleExpanded
property.label: Allow Multiple Expanded
property.description: When false (default), only one section can be expanded at a time (exclusive accordion). When true, multiple sections can be expanded simultaneously.

property.name: showIcons
property.label: Show Expand/Collapse Icons
property.description: Display chevron icons next to section headers to indicate expand/collapse state. Icons automatically rotate when sections are expanded.
